name: Iveda Solutions, Inc.
business: Iveda offers smart city technologies globally, offering advanced AI-driven video surveillance solutions and a robust suite of Internet of Things (IoT) platforms that power digital transformation for cities and commercial clients worldwide.
namedCustomers: NATIONAL CHUNG SHAN INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY
SECURITY INTEGRATION & CONSULTANT TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD.

exposures.sentence: IvedaAI consists of deep-learning video analytics software running in a computer/server environment that can either be deployed at an edge level or data center for centralized cloud model.
IvedaAI consists of deep-learning video analytics software running in a computer/server environment that can either be deployed at an edge level or data center for centralized cloud model.
Iveda offers many IoT sensors and devices for various applications, such as energy management, smart home, smart building, smart community and patient/elder care.

AI Functions Object Search Face Search (No Database Required) Face Recognition (from a Database) License Plate Recognition (100+ Countries), includes make and model Intrusion Detection Weapon Detection Fire Detection People Counting Vehicle Counting Temperature Detection Public Health Analytics (Facemask Detection) QR and Barcode Detection.
Iveda Smart Drone product offering is robust and expansive for a multitude of industrial, commercial, and military applications.

IvedaCare , launched in November 2022, is a simple, easy to use suite of wireless health and wellness devices intended to help you monitor the health and activities of your loved ones, even when you can't be there yourself.

Utilus network uses WiFi, 4G and 5G small cell capabilities, and other wireless protocols to provide distributed video surveillance with AI video search technology and remote management of local devices.
We offer smart power technology for office buildings, schools, shopping centers, hotels, hospitals, and smart city projects.
IvedaAI consists of deep-learning video analytics software running in a computer/server environment that can either be deployed at an edge level or data center for centralized cloud model.
vumastAR has the power to assist with critical measuring of carcinogenic chemical compound levels, electrical wiring, and welding inspections.
vumastAR: Supply Chain: Detect defects and anomalies for improved accuracy, increasing the bottom line by actively reducing lost revenue incurred from manual mistakes.

tamClaims.claim: Global smart city platforms market will grow at CAGR 9% from 2026 to 2032, from USD 208.8B to USD 416.1B.
tamClaims.sentence: A new report from Verified Market Research projects that the global smart city platforms market size will grow at a CAGR of 9% from 2026 to 2032, increasing from USD 208.8 billion to USD 416.1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Global IoT market expected to surge from USD 381.30B in 2021 to USD 1,854.76B in 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Looking ahead, IoT is expected to surge from USD 381.30 billion in 2021 to USD 1,854.76 billion in 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Global spending on AI will double from USD 50.1B in 2020 to over USD 110B in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Additionally, the International Data Corporation (IDC) projects that global spending on artificial intelligence will double from USD 50.1 billion in 2020 to over USD 110 billion in 2024.
